log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Gem Flight + Hypnotic Pattern.
MOVEMENT: Flies up 20ft.
BONUS: Gem Flight activated (2/3 remaining). Flying for 10 rounds.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):19+1=20 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):12+1=13 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):14+1=15 vs DC 16] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:18+4=22 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 2/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Target is flying. Hold Person to paralyze → they fall!
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:15+3=18 vs AC 14] HIT! 7casting_mod force damage. Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 1 remaining). DC 11 WIS save on Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician.
→ Gem Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: WIS save [d20:7+2=9 vs DC 11] FAIL!
